title: eto.memo.eval_score.v1
description: Payload schema for an evaluation score memo: one agent or oracle scoring a subject against a named metric. Validates the `payload` portion of an eto.memo.eval_score.v1 envelope; envelope shape is defined in docs/memo-schema-registry.md §2.

subject.description: Agent under evaluation. Either a DID (e.g. did:eto:...) or an SVM/EVM address.

score.description: Normalized score in [0, 1]. Producers are responsible for any per-metric scaling.

evaluator.description: Identity of the evaluator (DID or address).

evidence_uri.description: Optional pointer to off-chain evidence (logs, transcripts) for records that exceed the on-chain memo size budget.
